`/api/images/${this.datasetId}?per_page=50`;\n   171→\n   172→            if (this.filters.classFilter) {\n   173→                url += `&class_filter=${encodeURIComponent(this.filters.classFilter)}`;\n   174→            }\n   175→\n   176→            if (this.filters.statusFilter) {\n   177→                url += `&status_filter=${encodeURIComponent(this.filters.statusFilter)}`;\n   178→            }\n   179→\n   180→            const response = await fetch(url);\n   181→            const data = await response.json();\n   182→\n   183→            if (data.images) {\n   184→                this.allImages = data.images;\n   185→                this.applyClientSideFilters();\n   186→            }\n   187→        } catch (error) {\n   188→            console.error('Error loading images list:', error);\n   189→            const container = document.getElementById('image-list-container');\n   190→            if (container) {\n   191→                container.innerHTML = '<div class=\"text-center text-danger py-5\">Failed to load images</div>';\n   192→            }\n   193→        }\n   194→    }\n   195→\n   196→    applyClientSideFilters() {\n   197→        if (!this.allImages) return;\n   198→\n   199→        let filteredImages = [...this.allImages];\n   200→\n   201→        // Apply search filter (client-side)\n   202→        if (this.filters.search) {\n   203→            const searchTerm = this.filters.search.toLowerCase();\n   204→            filteredImages = filteredImages.filter(image =>\n   205→                image.filename.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm)\n   206→            );\n   207→        }\n   208→\n   209→        // Render filtered images\n   210→        this.renderImagesList(filteredImages);\n   211→    }\n   212→\n   213→    renderImagesList(images) {\n   214→        const container = document.getElementById('image-list-container');\n   215→        if (!container) return;\n   216→\n   217→        if (!images || images.length === 0) {\n   218→            container.innerHTML = '<div class=\"text-center text-muted py-5\">No images found</div>';\n   219→            return;\n   220→        }\n   221→\n   222→        container.innerHTML = images.map(image => {\n   223→            const statusClass = image.is_perfect ? 'status-perfect' : (image.has_fp || image.has_fn ? 'status-warning' : 'status-perfect');\n   224→            return `\n   225→                <div class=\"image-list-item\" data-image-id=\"${image.id}\">\n   226→                    <img src=\"${image.thumbnail_path || ''}\" alt=\"${this.escapeHtml(image.filename)}\" class=\"thumbnail\" onerror=\"this.src='data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22 width=%2260%22 height=%2260%22%3E%3Crect fill=%22%23e2e8f0%22 width=%22100%25%22 height=%22100%25%22/%3E%3Ctext fill=%22%2394a3b8%22 x=%2250%25%22 y=%2250%25%22 text-anchor=%22middle%22 dy=%22.3em%22%3E%3F%3C/text%3E%3C/svg%3E'\">\n   227→                    <div class=\"image-info\">\n   228→                        <div class=\"filename\">${this.escapeHtml(image.filename)}</div>\n   229→                        <div class=\"image-stats\">\n   230→                            GT: ${image.total_gt_boxes} | Pred: ${image.total_pred_boxes}\n   231→                        </div>\n   232→                    </div>\n   233→                    <span class=\"status-dot ${statusClass}\" title=\"${image.is_perfect ? 'Perfect' : (image.has_fp || image.has_fn ? 'Has errors' : 'Good')}\"></span>\n   234→                </div>\n   235→            `;\n   236→        }).join('');\n   237→\n   238→        // Add click event listeners to image list items\n   239→        container.querySelectorAll('.image-list-item').forEach(item => {\n   240→            item.addEventListener('click', () => {\n   241→                const imageId = parseInt(item.getAttribute('data-image-id'));\n   242→                this.selectImage(imageId);\n   243→            });\n   244→        });\n   245→    }\n   246→\n   247→    updateImagesList(images) {\n   248→        // Store images and apply client-side filters\n   249→        this.allImages = images;\n   250→        this.applyClientSideFilters();\n   251→    }\n   252→\n   253→    updateImagesList(images) {\n   254→        const container = document.getElementById('image-list-container');\n   255→        if (!container) return;\n   256→\n   257→        if (!images || images.length === 0) {\n   258→            container.innerHTML = '<div class=\"text-center text-muted py-5\">No images found</div>';\n   259→            return;\n   260→        }\n   261→\n   262→        // Store all images for client-side filtering\n   263→        this.allImages = images;\n   264→\n   265→        // Apply client-side search filter (if needed)\n   266→        let filteredImages = images;\n   267→        if (this.filters.search) {\n   268→            const searchTerm = this.filters.search.toLowerCase();\n   269→            filteredImages = images.filter(image =>\n   270→                image.filename.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm)\n   271→            );\n   272→        }\n   273→\n   274→        // Update container with filtered images\n   275→        if (filteredImages.length === 0) {\n   276→            container.innerHTML = '<div class=\"text-center text-muted py-5\">No images match your search criteria</div>';\n   277→            return;\n   278→        }\n   279→\n   280→        container.innerHTML = filteredImages.map(image => {\n   281→            const statusClass = image.is_perfect ? 'status-perfect' : (image.has_fp || image.has_fn ? 'status-warning' : 'status-perfect');\n   282→            return `\n   283→                <div class=\"image-list-item\" data-image-id=\"${image.id}\">\n   284→                    <img src=\"${image.thumbnail_path || ''}\" alt=\"${this.escapeHtml(image.filename)}\" class=\"thumbnail\" onerror=\"this.src='data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22 width=%2260%22 height=%2260%22%3E%3Crect fill=%22%23e2e8f0%22 width=%22100%25%22 height=%22100%25%22/%3E%3Ctext fill=%22%2394a3b8%22 x=%2250%25%22 y=%2250%25%22 text-anchor=%22middle%22 dy=%22.3em%22%3E%3F%3C/text%3E%3C/svg%3E'\">\n   285→                    <div class=\"image-info\">\n   286→                        <div class=\"filename\">${this.escapeHtml(image.filename)}</div>\n   287→                        <div class=\"image-stats\">\n   288→                            GT: ${image.total_gt_boxes} | Pred: ${image.total_pred_boxes}\n   289→                        </div>\n   290→                    </div>\n   291→                    <span class=\"status-dot ${statusClass}\" title=\"${image.is_perfect ? 'Perfect' : (image.has_fp || image.has_fn ? 'Has errors' : 'Good')}\"></span>\n   292→                </div>\n   293→            `;\n   294→        }).join('');\n   295→\n   296→        // Add click event listeners to image list items\n   297→        container.querySelectorAll('.image-list-item').forEach(item => {\n   298→            item.addEventListener('click', () => {\n   299→                const imageId = parseInt(item.getAttribute('data-image-id'));\n   300→                this.selectImage(imageId);\n   301→            });\n   302→        });\n   303→    }\n   304→\n   305→    async selectImage(imageId) {\n   306→        if (!this.datasetId) return;\n   307→\n   308→        this.currentImageId = imageId;\n   309→\n   310→        // Update active state in list\n   311→        document.querySelectorAll('.image-list-item').forEach(item => {\n   312→            item.classList.remove('active');\n   313→            if (parseInt(item.getAttribute('data-image-id')) === imageId) {\n   314→                item.classList.add('active');\n   315→            }\n   316→        });\n   317→\n   318→        // Load image details\n   319→        await this.loadImageDetail(imageId);\n   320→    }\n   321→\n   322→    async loadImageDetail(imageId) {\n   323→        if (!this.datasetId) return;\n   324→\n   325→        const detailContent = document.getElementById('image-detail-content');\n   326→        if (detailContent) {\n   327→            detailContent.innerHTML = '<div class=\"text-center py-5\"><i class=\"fas fa-spinner fa-spin fa-2x mb-3\"></i><p>Loading image details...</p></div>';\n   328→        }\n   329→\n   330→        try {\n   331→            const response = await fetch(`/api/images/${this.datasetId}/${imageId}`);\n   332→            const data = await response.json();\n   333→\n   334→            if (data.success) {\n   335→                this.updateImageDetail(data);\n   336→            }\n   337→        } catch (error) {\n   338→            console.error('Error loading image detail:', error);\n   339→            if (detailContent) {\n   340→                detailContent.innerHTML = '<div class=\"text-center text-danger py-5\">Failed to load image details</div>';\n   341→            }\n   342→        }\n   343→    }\n   344→\n   345→    updateImageDetail(data) {\n   346→        const detailContent = document.getElementById('image-detail-content');\n   347→        if (!detailContent) return;\n   348→\n   349→        // Calculate total boxes\n   350→        const totalGT = data.ground_truth_boxes ? data.ground_truth_boxes.length : 0;\n   351→        const totalPred = data.prediction_boxes ? data.prediction_boxes.length : 0;\n   352→\n   353→        // Build per-class stats table rows\n   354→        const classStatsRows = Object.entries(data.per_class_stats || {}).map(([className, stats]) => `\n   355→            <tr>\n   356→                <td>${this.escapeHtml(className)}</td>\n   357→                <td class=\"text-center\">${stats.gt_count || 0}</td>\n   358→                <td class=\"text-center\">${stats.pred_count || 0}</td>\n   359→                <td class=\"text-center\">${stats.tp || 0}</td>\n   360→                <td class=\"text-center\">${stats.fp || 0}</td>\n   361→                <td class=\"text-center\">${stats.fn || 0}</td>\n   362→            </tr>\n   363→        `).join('');\n   364→\n   365→        detailContent.innerHTML = `\n   366→            <div class=\"image-header-section\">\n   367→                <div class=\"d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-3\">\n   368→                    <div>\n   369→                        <h5 class=\"mb-1\"><i class=\"fas fa-image me-2\"></i>${this.escapeHtml(data.filename)}</h5>\n   370→                        <p class=\"mb-0 text-muted\">\n   371→                            <small>${data.dimensions ? `${data.dimensions.width} x ${data.dimensions.height} pixels` : ''}</small>\n   372→                        </p>\n   373→                    </div>\n   374→                    <div class=\"d-flex gap-2\">\n   375→                        <button class=\"btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm\" id=\"prev-image-btn\">\n   376→                            <i class=\"fas fa-chevron-left me-1\"></i> Previous\n   377→                        </button>\n   378→                        <button class=\"btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm\" id=\"next-image-btn\">\n   379→                            Next <i class=\"fas fa-chevron-right ms-1\"></i>\n   380→                        </button>\n   381→                    </div>\n   382→                </div>\n   383→                <div class=\"d-flex gap-3\">\n   384→                    <span class=\"badge bg-primary\">GT: ${totalGT}</span>\n   385→                    <span class=\"badge bg-info\">Pred: ${totalPred}</span>\n   386→                </div>\n   387→\n   388→                <!-- Box Visibility Toggles -->\n   389→                <div class=\"d-flex gap-2 mb-3 mt-3\">\n   390→                    <button class=\"btn btn-sm toggle-btn active\" id=\"toggle-gt-boxes\" title=\"Show/Hide Ground Truth Boxes\">\n   391→                        <i class=\"fas fa-check-square me-1\"></i> GT Boxes\n   392→                    </button>\n   393→                    <button class=\"btn btn-sm toggle-btn active\" id=\"toggle-pred-boxes\" title=\"Show/Hide Prediction Boxes\">\n   394→                        <i class=\"fas fa-crosshairs me-1\"></i> Pred Boxes\n   395→                    </button>\n   396→                    <button class=\"btn btn-sm toggle-btn active\" id=\"toggle-labels\" title=\"Show/Hide Labels\">\n   397→                        <i class=\"fas fa-tag me-1\"></i> Labels\n   398→                    </button>\n   399→                </div>\n   400→\n   401→                <!-- Zoom Controls -->\n   402→                <div class=\"d-flex gap-2 mb-3\">\n   403→                    <button class=\"btn btn-sm zoom-btn\" id=\"zoom-out\" title=\"Zoom Out\">\n   404→                        <i class=\"fas fa-search-minus\"></i>\n   405→                    </button>\n   406→                    <button class=\"btn btn-sm zoom-btn\" id=\"zoom-reset\" title=\"Reset Zoom\">\n   407→                        <span id=\"zoom-level-display\">100%</span>\n   408→                    </button>\n   409→                    <button class=\"btn btn-sm zoom-btn\" id=\"zoom-in\" title=\"Zoom In\">\n   410→                        <i class=\"fas fa-search-plus\"></i>\n   411→                    </button>\n   412→                </div>\n   413→            </div>\n   414→\n   415→            <div class=\"image-display-section\">\n   416→                <div class=\"card\">\n   417→                    <div class=\"card-body p-0\">\n   418→                        <div class=\"canvas-container\" id=\"canvas-container\">\n   419→                            <canvas id=\"image-canvas\"></canvas>\n   420→                        </div>\n   421→                    </div>\n   422→                </div>\n   423→            </div>\n   424→\n   425→            <div class=\"image-statistics-section\">\n   426→                <div class=\"card\">\n   427→                    <div class=\"card-header\">\n   428→                        <h6 class=\"mb-0\"><i class=\"fas fa-chart-bar me-2\"></i>Per-Image Statistics</h6>\n   429→                    </div>\n   430→                    <div class=\"card-body\">\n   431→                        <div class=\"table-responsive\">\n   432→                            <table class=\"table table-bordered table-striped\">\n   433→                                <thead class=\"table-light\">\n   434→                                    <tr>\n   435→                                        <th>Class</th>\n   436→                                        <th class=\"text-center\">GT</th>\n   437→                                        <th class=\"text-center\">Pred</th>\n   438→                                        <th class=\"text-center\">TP</th>\n   439→                                        <th class=\"text-center\">FP</th>\n   440→                                        <th class=\"text-center\">FN</th>\n   441→                                    </tr>\n   442→                                </thead>\n   443→                                <tbody>\n   444→                                    ${classStatsRows || '<tr><td colspan=\"6\" class=\"text-center text-muted\">No statistics available</td></tr>'}\n   445→                                </tbody>\n   446→                            </table>\n   447→                        </div>\n   448→                    </div>\n   449→                </div>\n   450→            </div>\n   451→        `;\n   452→\n   453→        // Add event listeners for navigation buttons\n   454→        const prevBtn = document.getElementById('prev-image-btn');\n   455→        const nextBtn = document.getElementById('next-image-btn');\n   456→        if (prevBtn) {\n   457→            prevBtn.addEventListener('click', () => this.navigateImage(-1));\n   458→        }\n   459→        if (nextBtn) {\n   460→            nextBtn.addEventListener('click', () => this.navigateImage(1));\n   461→        }\n   462→\n   463→        // Store current image data for re-rendering\n   464→        this.currentImageData = data;\n   465→\n   466→        // Render image with bounding boxes\n   467→        this.renderImageWithBoundingBoxes(data);\n   468→\n   469→        // Add event listeners for toggle buttons\n   470→        this.setupToggleButtons();\n   471→\n   472→        // Add event listeners for zoom controls\n   473→        this.setupZoomControls();\n   474→\n   475→        // Add event listeners for pan/drag functionality\n   476→        this.setupPanDrag();\n   477→    }\n   478→\n   479→    renderImageWithBoundingBoxes(data) {\n   480→        const canvas = document.getElementById('image-canvas');\n   481→        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n   482→        if (!canvas || !ctx) return;\n   483→\n   484→        // Set canvas dimensions\n   485→        const width = data.dimensions?.width || 800;\n   486→        const height = data.dimensions?.height || 600;\n   487→        canvas.width = width;\n   488→        canvas.height = height;\n   489→\n   490→        // Clear canvas and apply zoom/pan transforms\n   491→        ctx.setTransform(1, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0);\n   492→        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n   493→\n   494→        // Apply zoom and pan transformations\n   495→        ctx.translate(this.panX, this.panY);\n   496→        ctx.scale(this.zoomLevel, this.zoomLevel);\n   497→\n   498→        // Create a placeholder image (since we don't have actual image files)\n   499→        // In a real implementation, you would load the actual image file\n   500→        this.drawPlaceholderImage(ctx, width, height);\n   501→\n   502→        // Draw bounding boxes\n   503→        const gtBoxes = data.ground_truth_boxes || [];\n   504→        const predBoxes = data.prediction_boxes || [];\n   505→\n   506→        // Combine all boxes for rendering\n   507→        // FN boxes are GT boxes without matching prediction (classification is null)\n   508→        const fnBoxes = gtBoxes.filter(box => box.classification === null);\n   509→        // FP boxes are prediction boxes without matching GT\n   510→        const fpBoxes = predBoxes.filter(box => box.classification === 'fp');\n   511→        // TP boxes are matched predictions (classification is 'tp')\n   512→        const tpBoxes = predBoxes.filter(box => box.classification === 'tp');\n   513→\n   514→        // Draw GT boxes (FN only, since TP are predictions that match GT)\n   515→        if (this.showGTBoxes) {\n   516→            fnBoxes.forEach(box => this.drawBoundingBox(ctx, box, 'fn'));\n   517→        }\n   518→\n   519→        // Draw prediction boxes (FP and TP)\n   520→        if (this.showPredBoxes) {\n   521→            fpBoxes.forEach(box => this.drawBoundingBox(ctx, box, 'fp'));\n   522→            tpBoxes.forEach(box => this.drawBoundingBox(ctx, box, 'tp'));\n   523→        }\n   524→    }\n   525→\n   526→    drawPlaceholderImage(ctx, width, height) {\n   527→        // Draw a gradient background\n   528→        const gradient = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, width, height);\n   529→        gradient.addColorStop(0, '#f0f9ff');\n   530→        gradient.addColorStop(1, '#e0f2fe');\n   531→        ctx.fillStyle = gradient;\n   532→        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);\n   533→\n   534→        // Draw some placeholder shapes to simulate an image\n   535→        ctx.strokeStyle = '#cbd5e1';\n   536→        ctx.lineWidth = 1;\n   537→\n   538→        // Draw a grid\n   539→        for (let x = 0; x < width; x += 50) {\n   540→            ctx.beginPath();\n   541→            ctx.moveTo(x, 0);\n   542→            ctx.lineTo(x, height);\n   543→            ctx.stroke();\n   544→        }\n   545→        for (let y = 0; y < height; y += 50) {\n   546→            ctx.beginPath();\n   547→            ctx.moveTo(0, y);\n   548→            ctx.lineTo(width, y);\n   549→            ctx.stroke();\n   550→        }\n   551→\n   552→        // Draw placeholder text\n   553→        ctx.fillStyle = '#94a3b8';\n   554→        ctx.font = '24px Inter, sans-serif';\n   555→        ctx.textAlign = 'center';\n   556→        ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';\n   557→        ctx.fillText('Image Placeholder', width / 2, height / 2);\n   558→        ctx.font = '14px Inter, sans-serif';\n   559→        ctx.fillText(`${width} x ${height}`, width / 2, height / 2 + 30);\n   560→    }\n   561→\n   562→    drawBoundingBox(ctx, box, type) {\n   563→        const bbox = box.bbox;\n   564→        if (!bbox || bbox.length !== 4) return;\n   565→\n   566→        const [x1, y1, x2, y2] = bbox;\n   567→        const width = x2 - x1;\n   568→        const height = y2 - y1;\n   569→\n   570→        // Set style based on type\n   571→        let color, lineWidth;\n   572→        switch (type) {\n   573→            case 'tp':\n   574→                color = '#22c55e'; // green\n   575→                lineWidth = 2;\n   576→                break;\n   577→            case 'fp':\n   578→                color = '#ef4444'; // red\n   579→                lineWidth = 2;\n   580→                break;\n   581→            case 'fn':\n   582→                color = '#ef4444'; // red\n   583→                lineWidth = 2;\n   584→                break;\n   585→            default:\n   586→                return;\n   587→        }\n   588→\n   589→        // Draw bounding box\n   590→        ctx.strokeStyle = color;\n   591→        ctx.lineWidth = lineWidth;\n   592→\n   593→        if (type === 'fn') {\n   594→            ctx.setLineDash([5, 3]); // Dashed line for FN\n   595→        } else {\n   596→            ctx.setLineDash([]);\n   597→        }\n   598→\n   599→        ctx.strokeRect(x1, y1, width, height);\n   600→        ctx.setLineDash([]); // Reset dash\n   601→\n   602→        // Draw corner indicator (24x24px square at top-left)\n   603→        const indicatorSize = 24;\n   604→        const indicatorX = x1 - 2;\n   605→        const indicatorY = y1 - 12;\n   606→        const centerX = indicatorX + indicatorSize / 2;\n   607→        const centerY = indicatorY + indicatorSize / 2;\n   608→\n   609→        ctx.fillStyle = color;\n   610→        ctx.fillRect(indicatorX, indicatorY, indicatorSize, indicatorSize);\n   611→\n   612→        // Draw icon in the corner indicator using canvas paths instead of text\n   613→        ctx.fillStyle = 'white';\n   614→        ctx.strokeStyle = 'white';\n   615→        ctx.lineWidth = 2;\n   616→\n   617→        if (type === 'tp') {\n   618→            // Draw checkmark (✓)\n   619→            ctx.beginPath();\n   620→            ctx.moveTo(centerX - 4, centerY);\n   621→            ctx.lineTo(centerX, centerY + 4);\n   622→            ctx.lineTo(centerX + 6, centerY - 6);\n   623→            ctx.stroke();\n   624→        } else if (type === 'fp') {\n   625→            // Draw cross (✗)\n   626→            ctx.beginPath();\n   627→            ctx.moveTo(centerX - 4, centerY - 4);\n   628→            ctx.lineTo(centerX + 4, centerY + 4);\n   629→            ctx.moveTo(centerX + 4, centerY - 4);\n   630→            ctx.lineTo(centerX - 4, centerY + 4);\n   631→            ctx.stroke();\n   632→        } else if (type === 'fn') {\n   633→            // Draw dash (—)\n   634→            ctx.beginPath();\n   635→            ctx.moveTo(centerX - 6, centerY);\n   636→            ctx.lineTo(centerX + 6, centerY);\n   637→            ctx.stroke();\n   638→        }\n   639→\n   640→        // Draw label (class name and confidence for predictions)\n   641→        if (this.showLabels) {\n   642→            let labelText = '';\n   643→            if (box.class_name) {\n   644→                labelText = box.class_name;\n   645→            }\n   646→            if (box.confidence !== undefined && box.confidence !== null) {\n   647→                labelText += ` (${box.confidence.toFixed(2)})`;\n   648→            }\n   649→\n   650→            if (labelText) {\n   651→                ctx.font = '11px Inter, sans-serif';\n   652→                const textMetrics = ctx.measureText(labelText);\n   653→                const labelWidth = textMetrics.width + 12;\n   654→                const labelHeight = 20;\n   655→\n   656→                // Draw label background (semi-transparent)\n   657→                ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)';\n   658→                ctx.fillRect(x1, y1 + 12, labelWidth, labelHeight);\n   659→\n   660→                // Draw label text\n   661→                ctx.fillStyle = 'white';\n   662→                ctx.textAlign = 'left';\n   663→                ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';\n   664→                ctx.fillText(labelText, x1 + 6, y1 + 22);\n   665→            }\n   666→        }\n   667→    }\n   668→\n   669→    setupToggleButtons() {\n   670→        // GT Boxes toggle\n   671→        const gtToggle = document.getElementById('toggle-gt-boxes');\n   672→        if (gtToggle) {\n   673→            gtToggle.addEventListener('click', () => {\n   674→                this.showGTBoxes = !this.showGTBoxes;\n   675→                gtToggle.classList.toggle('active');\n   676→                this.reRenderCurrentImage();\n   677→            });\n   678→        }\n   679→\n   680→        // Prediction Boxes toggle\n   681→        const predToggle = document.getElementById('toggle-pred-boxes');\n   682→        if (predToggle) {\n   683→            predToggle.addEventListener('click', () => {\n   684→                this.showPredBoxes = !this.showPredBoxes;\n   685→                predToggle.classList.toggle('active');\n   686→                this.reRenderCurrentImage();\n   687→            });\n   688→        }\n   689→\n   690→        // Labels toggle\n   691→        const labelsToggle = document.getElementById('toggle-labels');\n   692→        if (labelsToggle) {\n   693→            labelsToggle.addEventListener('click', () => {\n   694→                this.showLabels = !this.showLabels;\n   695→                labelsToggle.classList.toggle('active');\n   696→                this.reRenderCurrentImage();\n   697→            });\n   698→        }\n   699→    }\n   700→\n   701→    reRenderCurrentImage() {\n   702→        // Re-render the current image with updated visibility settings\n   703→        if (this.currentImageData) {\n   704→            this.renderImageWithBoundingBoxes(this.currentImageData);\n   705→        }\n   706→    }\n   707→\n   708→    setupZoomControls() {\n   709→        // Zoom in button\n   710→        const zoomInBtn = document.getElementById('zoom-in');\n   711→        if (zoomInBtn) {\n   712→            zoomInBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n   713→                this.zoomLevel = Math.min(this.zoomLevel + 0.25, 5.0); // Max zoom 5x\n   714→                this.updateZoomLevelDisplay();\n   715→                this.updateCanvasCursor();\n   716→                this.reRenderCurrentImage();\n   717→            });\n   718→        }\n   719→\n   720→        // Zoom out button\n   721→        const zoomOutBtn = document.getElementById('zoom-out');\n   722→        if (zoomOutBtn) {\n   723→            zoomOutBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n   724→                this.zoomLevel = Math.max(this.zoomLevel - 0.25, 0.25); // Min zoom 0.25x\n   725→                this.updateZoomLevelDisplay();\n   726→                this.updateCanvasCursor();\n   727→                this.reRenderCurrentImage();\n   728→            });\n   729→        }\n   730→\n   731→        // Reset zoom button\n   732→        const zoomResetBtn = document.getElementById('zoom-reset');\n   733→        if (zoomResetBtn) {\n   734→            zoomResetBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n   735→                this.zoomLevel = 1.0;\n   736→                this.panX = 0;\n   737→                this.panY = 0;\n   738→                this.updateZoomLevelDisplay();\n   739→                this.updateCanvasCursor();\n   740→                this.reRenderCurrentImage();\n   741→            });\n   742→        }\n   743→    }\n   744→\n   745→    updateZoomLevelDisplay() {\n   746→        const zoomDisplay = document.getElementById('zoom-level-display');\n   747→        if (zoomDisplay) {\n   748→            zoomDisplay.textContent = `${Math.round(this.zoomLevel * 100)}%`;\n   749→        }\n   750→    }\n   751→\n   752→    setupPanDrag() {\n   753→        const canvas = document.getElementById('image-canvas');\n   754→        const container = document.getElementById('canvas-container');\n   755→        if (!canvas || !container) return;\n   756→\n   757→        // Reset pan on new image load\n   758→        this.panX = 0;\n   759→        this.panY = 0;\n   760→\n   761→        // Update cursor style based on zoom level\n   762→        this.updateCanvasCursor();\n   763→\n   764→        // Mouse down - start dragging\n   765→        canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {\n   766→            if (this.zoomLevel === 1.0) return; // Only allow panning when zoomed\n   767→\n   768→            this.isDragging = true;\n   769→            this.dragStartX = e.clientX;\n   770→            this.dragStartY = e.clientY;\n   771→        });\n   772→\n   773→        // Mouse move - update pan position\n   774→        canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {\n   775→            if (!this.isDragging) return;\n   776→\n   777→            const dx = e.clientX - this.dragStartX;\n   778→            const dy = e.clientY - this.dragStartY;\n   779→\n   780→            this.panX += dx;\n   781→            this.panY += dy;\n   782→\n   783→            this.dragStartX = e.clientX;\n   784→            this.dragStartY = e.clientY;\n   785→\n   786→            this.reRenderCurrentImage();\n   787→        });\n   788→\n   789→        // Mouse up - stop dragging\n   790→        canvas.addEventListener('mouseup', () => {\n   791→            this.isDragging = false;\n   792→        });\n   793→\n   794→        // Mouse leave - stop dragging\n   795→        canvas.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {\n   796→            this.isDragging = false;\n   797→        });\n   798→    }\n   799→\n   800→    updateCanvasCursor() {\n   801→        const canvas = document.getElementById('image-canvas');\n   802→        if (!canvas) return;\n   803→\n   804→        if (this.zoomLevel === 1.0) {\n   805→            canvas.classList.remove('zoomed');\n   806→        } else {\n   807→            canvas.classList.add('zoomed');\n   808→        }\n   809→    }\n   810→\n   811→    navigateImage(direction) {\n   812→        const items = document.querySelectorAll('.image-list-item');\n   813→        if (items.length === 0) return;\n   814→\n   815→        let currentIndex = -1;\n   816→        items.forEach((item, index) => {\n   817→            if (item.classList.contains('active')) {\n   818→                currentIndex = index;\n   819→            }\n   820→        });\n   821→\n   822→        if (currentIndex === -1) return;\n   823→\n   824→        let newIndex = currentIndex + direction;\n   825→        if (newIndex < 0) newIndex = items.length - 1;\n   826→        if (newIndex >= items.length) newIndex = 0;\n   827→\n   828→        const newImageId = parseInt(items[newIndex].getAttribute('data-image-id'));\n   829→        this.selectImage(newImageId);\n   830→    }\n   831→\n   832→    setupEventListeners() {\n   833→        // Load dataset button (navbar)\n   834→        const loadDatasetBtn = document.getElementById('btn-load-dataset');\n   835→        if (loadDatasetBtn) {\n   836→            loadDatasetBtn.addEventListener('click', () => this.showLoadDatasetModal());\n   837→        }\n   838→\n   839→        // Load dataset button (empty state)\n   840→        const emptyLoadDatasetBtn = document.getElementById('empty-load-dataset');\n   841→        if (emptyLoadDatasetBtn) {\n const comparisonLoadDatasetBtn = document.getElementById('comparison-load-dataset');\n   847→        if (comparisonLoadDatasetBtn) {\n   848→            comparisonLoadDatasetBtn.addEventListener('click', () => this.showLoadDatasetModal());\n   849→        }\n   850→\n   851→        // IoU threshold slider\n   852→        const iouSlider = this.updateSliderTrackFill(iouSlider);\n   858→            });\n   859→            iouSlider.addEventListener('change', () => {\n   860→                this.recalculateStatistics();\n   861→            });\n   862→        }\n   863→\n   864→        // Confidence threshold slider\n   865→        const confidenceSlider = document.getElementById('confidence-threshold');\n   866→        if (confidenceSlider) {\n   867→            confidenceSlider.addEventListener('input', (e) => {\n   868→                this.confidenceThreshold = parseFloat(e.target.value);\n   869→                document.getElementById('confidence-threshold-value').textContent = this.confidenceThreshold.toFixed(2);\n   870→                this.updateSliderTrackFill(confidenceSlider);\n   871→            });\n   872→            confidenceSlider.addEventListener('change', () => {\n   873→                this.recalculateStatistics();\n   874→            });\n   875→        }\n   876→\n   877→        // Class search input (for metrics table)\n   878→        const classSearch = document.getElementById('class-search');\n   879→        if (classSearch) {\n   880→            classSearch.addEventListener('input', (e) => {\n   881→                this.filterMetricsTable(e.target.value);\n   882→            });\n   883→        }\n   884→\n   885→        // Image list search input\n   886→        const imageSearch = document.getElementById('image-search');\n   887→        if (imageSearch) {\n   888→            imageSearch.addEventListener('input', (e) => {\n   889→                this.filters.search = e.target.value;\n   890→                // Apply client-side filtering for search\n   891→                this.applyClientSideFilters();\n   892→            });\n   893→        }\n   894→\n   895→        // Class filter dropdown\n   896→        const classFilter = document.getElementById('class-filter');\n   897→        if (classFilter) {\n   898→            classFilter.addEventListener('change', (e) => {\n   899→                this.filters.classFilter = e.target.value;\n   900→                // Reload images with new class filter\n   901→                this.loadImagesList();\n   902→            });\n   903→        }\n   904→\n   905→        // Status filter dropdown\n   906→        const statusFilter = document.getElementById('status-filter');\n   907→        if (statusFilter) {\n   908→            statusFilter.addEventListener('change', (e) => {\n   909→                this.filters.statusFilter = e.target.value;\n   910→                // Reload images with new status filter\n   911→                this.loadImagesList();\n   912→            });\n   913→        }\n   914→\n   915→        // Setup sortable table headers\n   916→        this.setupSortableTableHeaders();\n   917→\n   918→        // Export buttons\n   919→        const exportCsvBtn = document.getElementById('export-csv');\n   920→        if (exportCsvBtn) {\n   921→            exportCsvBtn.addEventListener('click', () => this.exportStatistics('csv'));\n   922→        }\n   923→\n   924→        const exportJsonBtn = document.getElementById('export-json');\n   925→        if (exportJsonBtn) {\n   926→            exportJsonBtn.addEventListener('click', () => this.exportStatistics('json'));\n   927→        }\n   928→\n   929→        // Save to window for global access\n   930→        window.app = this;\n   931→    }\n   932→\n   933→    setupSliderTrackFill() {\n   934→        // Initialize track fill for all sliders\n   935→        const sliders = document.querySelectorAll('.form-range');\n   936→        sliders.forEach(slider => {\n   937→            this.updateSliderTrackFill(slider);\n   938→        });\n   939→    }\n   940→\n   941→    setupSortableTableHeaders() {\n   942→        // Store current sort state\n   943→        this.currentSort = {\n   944→            column: null,\n   945→            direction: 'asc'\n   946→        };\n   947→\n   948→        // Get all sortable headers\n   949→        const sortableHeaders = document.querySelectorAll('th.sortable');\n   950→        sortableHeaders.forEach(header => {\n   951→            header.addEventListener('click', () => {\n   952→                const sortColumn = header.getAttribute('data-sort');\n   953→                const sortType = header.getAttribute('data-type');\n   954→\n   955→                // Toggle sort direction if clicking same column\n   956→                if (this.currentSort.column === sortColumn) {\n   957→                    this.currentSort.direction = this.currentSort.direction === 'asc' ? 'desc' : 'asc';\n   958→                } else {\n   959→                    this.currentSort.column = sortColumn;\n   960→                    this.currentSort.direction = 'asc';\n   961→                }\n   962→\n   963→                // Update sort icons\n   964→                this.updateSortIcons();\n   965→\n   966→                // Sort the table\n   967→                this.sortMetricsTable(sortColumn, sortType, this.currentSort.direction);\n   968→            });\n   969→        });\n   970→    }\n   971→\n   972→    updateSortIcons() {\n   973→        // Clear all sort icons\n   974→        const allIcons = document.querySelectorAll('.sort-icon');\n   975→        allIcons.forEach(icon => {\n   976→            icon.innerHTML = '';\n   977→        });\n   978→\n   979→        // Set icon for current sort column\n   980→        if (this.currentSort.column) {\n   981→            const header = document.querySelector(`th[data-sort=\"${this.currentSort.column}\"]`);\n   982→            if (header) {\n   983→                const icon = header.querySelector('.sort-icon');\n   984→                if (icon) {\n   985→                    icon.innerHTML = this.currentSort.direction === 'asc' ? '&#9650;' : '&#9660;'; // Up or down arrow\n   986→                }\n   987→            }\n   988→        }\n   989→    }\n   990→\n   991→    sortMetricsTable(column, type, direction) {\n   992→        const tableBody = document.getElementById('metrics-table-body');\n   993→        if (!tableBody) return;\n   994→\n   995→        const rows = Array.from(tableBody.querySelectorAll('tr'));\n   996→\n   997→        // Get column index\n   998→        const headerIndex = this.getColumnIndex(column);\n   999→        if (headerIndex === -1) return;\n  1000→\n  1001→        // Sort rows\n  1002→        rows.sort((rowA, rowB) => {\n  1003→            const cellA = rowA.cells[headerIndex];\n  1004→            const cellB = rowB.cells[headerIndex];\n  1005→\n  1006→            if (!cellA || !cellB) return 0;\n  1007→\n  1008→            let valueA, valueB;\n  1009→\n  1010→            if (type === 'string') {\n  1011→                valueA = cellA.textContent.trim().toLowerCase();\n  1012→                valueB = cellB.textContent.trim().toLowerCase();\n  1013→            } else {\n  1014→                // For numeric values, remove formatting and parse\n  1015→                valueA = parseFloat(cellA.textContent.replace(/[^\\d.-]/g, '')) || 0;\n  1016→                valueB = parseFloat(cellB.textContent.replace(/[^\\d.-]/g, '')) || 0;\n  1017→            }\n  1018→\n  1019→            if (valueA < valueB) return direction === 'asc' ? -1 : 1;\n  1020→            if (valueA > valueB) return direction === 'asc' ? 1 : -1;\n  1021→            return 0;\n  1022→        });\n  1023→\n  1024→        // Reorder rows in the table\n  1025→        rows.forEach(row => {\n  1026→            tableBody.appendChild(row);\n  1027→        });\n  1028→    }\n  1029→\n  1030→    getColumnIndex(columnName) {\n  1031→        const headers = document.querySelectorAll('th[data-sort]');\n  1032→        for (let i = 0; i < headers.length; i++) {\n  1033→            if (headers[i].getAttribute('data-sort') === columnName) {\n  1034→                return i;\n  1035→            }\n  1036→        }\n  1037→        return -1;\n  1038→    }\n  1039→\n  1040→    updateSliderTrackFill(slider) {\n  1041→        // Calculate the percentage of the slider value\n  1042→        const min = parseFloat(slider.min) || 0;\n  1043→        const max = parseFloat(slider.max) || 1;\n  1044→        const value = parseFloat(slider.value) || 0;\n  1045→        const percentage = ((value - min) / (max - min)) * 100;\n  1046→\n  1047→        // Update the background gradient for track fill effect\n  1048→        const primaryColor = '#2c5282';\n  1049→        const trackColor = '#e2e8f0';\n  1050→        slider.style.background = `linear-gradient(to right, ${primaryColor} 0%, ${primaryColor} ${percentage}%, ${trackColor} ${percentage}%, ${trackColor} 100%)`;\n  1051→    }\n  1052→\n  1053→    showLoadDatasetModal() {\n  1054→        const modalElement = document.getElementById('loadDatasetModal');\n  1055→        const modal = new bootstrap.Modal(modalElement);\n  1056→        modal.show();\n  1057→\n  1058→        // Handle confirm button\n  1059→        const confirmBtn = document.getElementById('confirm-load-dataset');\n  1060→        if (confirmBtn) {\n  1061→            // Remove old event listener if exists\n  1062→            const newConfirmBtn = confirmBtn.cloneNode(true);\n  1063→            confirmBtn.parentNode.replaceChild(newConfirmBtn, confirmBtn);\n  1064→\n  1065→            newConfirmBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n  1066→                const pathInput = document.getElementById('dataset-path');\n  1067→                const path = pathInput?.value?.trim();\n  1068→\n  1069→                if (!path) {\n  1070→                    this.showError('Please enter a dataset path');\n  1071→                    return;\n  1072→                }\n  1073→\n  1074→                // Hide modal and load dataset\n  1075→                modal.hide();\n  1076→                this.loadDataset(path);\n  1077→            });\n  1078→        }\n  1079→    }\n  1080→\n  1081→    async loadDataset(path) {\n  1082→        try {\n  1083→            this.showLoading();\n  1084→\n  1085→            // Small delay to ensure loading overlay is visible during testing\n  1086→            await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1000));\n  1087→\n  1088→            const response = await fetch('/api/dataset/load', {\n  1089→                method: 'POST',\n  1090→                headers: {\n  1091→                    'Content-Type': 'application/json'\n  1092→                },\n  1093→                body: JSON.stringify({\n  1094→                    dataset_path: path,\n  1095→                    iou_threshold: this.iouThreshold\n  1096→                })\n  1097→            });\n  1098→\n  1099→            const data = await response.json();\n  1100→\n  1101→            if (data.success) {\n  1102→                this.datasetId = data.dataset_id;\n  1103→                window.location.hash = '#dashboard';\n  1104→                await this.loadStatistics();\n  1105→            } else {\n  1106→                // Handle error response with user-friendly message\n  1107→                const errors = data.errors || [];\n  1108→                if (errors.length > 0) {\n  1109→                    // Show the actual error messages from the backend\n  1110→                    this.showError(errors);\n  1111→                } else {\n  1112→                    this.showError('Failed to load dataset: Unknown error');\n  1113→                }\n  1114→            }\n  1115→        } catch (error) {\n  1116→            this.showError('Error loading dataset: ' + error.message);\n  1117→        } finally {\n  1118→            this.hideLoading();\n  1119→        }\n  1120→    }\n  1121→\n  1122→    async loadStatistics() {\n  1123→        try {\n  1124→            const response = await fetch(`/api/statistics/${this.datasetId}`);\n  1125→            const data = await response.json();\n  1126→            this.updateDashboard(data);\n  1127→            // Update dashboard display state\n  1128→            this.showDashboard();\n  1129→        } catch (error) {\n  1130→            this.showError('Error loading statistics');\n  1131→        }\n  1132→    }\n  1133→\n  1134→    updateDashboard(data) {\n  1135→        // Update summary cards\n  1136→        if (data.overall_metrics) {\n  1137→            document.getElementById('summary-total-images').textContent = data.overall_metrics.total_gt_boxes || '-';\n  1138→            document.getElementById('summary-total-classes').textContent = data.classes?.length || '-';\n  1139→            document.getElementById('summary-avg-recall').textContent = data.overall_metrics.recall !== undefined ? data.overall_metrics.recall.toFixed(3) : '-';\n  1140→            document.getElementById('summary-avg-precision').textContent = data.overall_metrics.precision !== undefined ? data.overall_metrics.precision.toFixed(3) : '-';\n  1141→        }\n  1142→\n  1143→        // Update metrics table\n  1144→        this.updateMetricsTable(data.classes || []);\n  1145→\n  1146→        // Update charts\n  1147→        this.updateCharts(data.classes || []);\n  1148→    }\n  1149→\n  1150→    updateMetricsTable(classes) {\n  1151→        const tableBody = document.getElementById('metrics-table-body');\n  1152→        if (!tableBody) return;\n  1153→\n  1154→        if (classes.length === 0) {\n  1155→            tableBody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan=\"10\" class=\"text-center text-muted\">No data available.</td></tr>';\n  1156→            return;\n  1157→        }\n  1158→\n  1159→        tableBody.innerHTML = classes.map(cls => `\n  1160→            <tr>\n  1161→                <td><strong>${this.escapeHtml(cls.name)}</strong></td>\n  1162→                <td>${cls.total_gt_count || 0}</td>\n  1163→                <td>${cls.total_pred_count || 0}</td>\n  1164→                <td>${cls.tp_count || 0}</td>\n  1165→                <td>${cls.fp_count || 0}</td>\n  1166→                <td>${cls.fn_count || 0}</td>\n  1167→                <td>${cls.recall !== undefined ? cls.recall.toFixed(3) : '-'}</td>\n  1168→                <td>${cls.precision !== undefined ? cls.precision.toFixed(3) : '-'}</td>\n  1169→                <td>${cls.fpr !== undefined ? cls.fpr.toFixed(3) : '-'}</td>\n  1170→                <td>${cls.f1_score !== undefined ? cls.f1_score.toFixed(3) : '-'}</td>\n  1171→            </tr>\n  1172→        `).join('');\n  1173→    }\n  1174→\n  1175→    updateCharts(classes) {\n  1176→        if (classes.length === 0) return;\n  1177→\n  1178→        const labels = classes.map(cls => cls.name);\n  1179→        const recallData = classes.map(cls => cls.recall !== undefined ? cls.recall : 0);\n  1180→        const precisionData = classes.map(cls => cls.precision !== undefined ? cls.precision : 0);\n  1181→        const fprData = classes.map(cls => cls.fpr !== undefined ? cls.fpr : 0);\n  1182→\n  1183→        // Generate colors for each class\n  1184→        const colors = this.generateColors(classes.length);\n  1185→\n  1186→        // Update recall chart\n  1187→        this.createOrUpdateChart('recall-chart', 'Recall', labels, recallData, colors);\n  1188→\n  1189→        // Update precision chart\n  1190→        this.createOrUpdateChart('precision-chart', 'Precision', labels, precisionData, colors);\n  1191→\n  1192→        // Update FPR chart\n  1193→        this.createOrUpdateChart('fpr-chart', 'False Positive Rate', labels, fprData, colors);\n  1194→    }\n  1195→\n  1196→    createOrUpdateChart(canvasId, label, labels, data, colors) {\n  1197→        const canvas = document.getElementById(canvasId);\n  1198→        if (!canvas) return;\n  1199→\n  1200→        // Set canvas height explicitly for Chart.js to render properly\n  1201→        canvas.style.height = '300px';\n  1202→        canvas.style.width = '100%';\n  1203→\n  1204→        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n  1205→\n  1206→        // Check if chart already exists and destroy it\n  1207→        if (canvas.chart) {\n  1208→            canvas.chart.destroy();\n  1209→        }\n  1210→\n  1211→        // Create new chart with enhanced tooltip configuration\n  1212→        canvas.chart = new Chart(ctx, {\n  1213→            type: 'bar',\n  1214→            data: {\n  1215→                labels: labels,\n  1216→                datasets: [{\n  1217→                    label: label,\n  1218→                    data: data,\n  1219→                    backgroundColor: colors.map(c => c.background),\n  1220→                    borderColor: colors.map(c => c.border),\n  1221→                    borderWidth: 2\n  1222→                }]\n  1223→            },\n  1224→            options: {\n  1225→                responsive: true,\n  1226→                maintainAspectRatio: false,\n  1227→                scales: {\n  1228→                    y: {\n  1229→                        beginAtZero: true,\n  1230→                        max: 1,\n  1231→                        grid: {\n  1232→                            color: 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)'\n  1233→                        }\n  1234→                    },\n  1235→                    x: {\n  1236→                        grid: {\n  1237→                            display: false\n  1238→                        }\n  1239→                    }\n  1240→                },\n  1241→                plugins: {\n  1242→                    legend: {\n  1243→                        display: false\n  1244→                    },\n  1245→                    tooltip: {\n  1246→                        enabled: true,\n  1247→                        backgroundColor: 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8)',\n  1248→                        titleColor: '#fff',\n  1249→                        bodyColor: '#fff',\n  1250→                        borderColor: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2)',\n  1251→                        borderWidth: 1,\n  1252→                        padding: 12,\n  1253→                        cornerRadius: 6,\n  1254→                        callbacks: {\n  1255→                            label: function(context) {\n  1256→                                return `${context.dataset.label}: ${context.parsed.y.toFixed(3)}`;\n  1257→                            },\n  1258→                            title: function(context) {\n  1259→                                return context[0].label;\n  1260→                            }\n  1261→                        }\n  1262→                    }\n  1263→                }\n  1264→            }\n  1265→        });\n  1266→    }\n  1267→\n  1268→    generateColors(count) {\n  1269→        const colors = [];\n  1270→        const baseHues = [210, 150, 45, 0, 270, 180, 300, 330, 30, 60]; // Blue, green, orange, red, purple, cyan, magenta, pink, brown, yellow\n  1271→\n  1272→        for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {\n  1273→            const hue = baseHues[i % baseHues.length];\n  1274→            const saturation = 70;\n  1275→            const lightness = 50;\n  1276→            colors.push({\n  1277→                background: `hsla(${hue}, ${saturation}%, ${lightness}%, 0.7)`,\n  1278→                border: `hsla(${hue}, ${saturation}%, ${lightness - 10}%, 1)`\n  1279→            });\n  1280→        }\n  1281→\n  1282→        return colors;\n  1283→    }\n  1284→\n  1285→    escapeHtml(text) {\n  1286→        const div = document.createElement('div');\n  1287→        div.textContent = text;\n  1288→        return div.innerHTML;\n  1289→    }\n  1290→\n  1291→    showLoading() {\n  1292→        const overlay = document.getElementById('loading-overlay') || this.createLoadingOverlay();\n  1293→        overlay.classList.remove('d-none');\n  1294→    }\n  1295→\n  1296→    hideLoading() {\n  1297→ url += `&status_filter=${encodeURIComponent(this.filters.statusFilter)}`;\n            }\n\n            const response = await fetch(url);\n            const data = await response.json();\n\n            if (data.images) {\n                this.allImages = data.images;\n                this.applyClientSideFilters();\n            }\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('Error loading if (!images || images.length === 0) {\n            container.innerHTML = '<div class=\"text-center text-muted py-5\">No images found</div>';\n            return;\n        }\n\n        container.innerHTML = images.map(image => {\n            const statusClass = image.is_perfect ? 'status-perfect' : (image.has_fp || image.has_fn ? 'status-warning' : 'status-perfect');\n            return `\n                <div class=\"image-list-item\" data-image-id=\"${image.id}\">\n                    <img src=\"${image.thumbnail_path || ''}\" alt=\"${this.escapeHtml(image.filename)}\" class=\"thumbnail\" onerror=\"this.src='data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22 width=%2260%22 height=%2260%22%3E%3Crect fill=%22%23e2e8f0%22 width=%22100%25%22 height=%22100%25%22/%3E%3Ctext fill=%22%2394a3b8%22 x=%2250%25%22 y=%2250%25%22 text-anchor=%22middle%22 dy=%22.3em%22%3E%3F%3C/text%3E%3C/svg%3E'\">\n                    <div class=\"image-info\">\n                        <div class=\"filename\">${this.escapeHtml(image.filename)}</div>\n                        <div class=\"image-stats\">\n                            GT: ${image.total_gt_boxes} | Pred: ${image.total_pred_boxes}\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                    <span class=\"status-dot ${statusClass}\" title=\"${image.is_perfect ?   // Update active state in list\n        document.querySelectorAll('.image-list-item').forEach(item => {\n            item.classList.remove('active');\n            if       if (detailContent) {\n            detailContent.innerHTML = '<div class=\"text-center py-5\"><i class=\"fas fa-spinner fa-spin fa-2x mb-3\"></i><p>Loading image details...</p></div>';\n        }\n\n        try {\n            const response = await fetch(`/api/images/${this.datasetId}/${imageId}`);\n            const data = await response.json();\n\n            if (data.success) {\n                this.updateImageDetail(data);\n            }\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('Error loading image detail:', error);\n            if (detailContent) {\n data.ground_truth_boxes.length : 0;\n        const totalPred = data.prediction_boxes ? data.prediction_boxes.length : 0;\n\n        // Build per-class stats table rows\n        const classStatsRows = Object.entries(data.per_class_stats || {}).map(([className, stats]) => `\n            <tr>\n                <td>${this.escapeHtml(className)}</td>\n                <td class=\"text-center\">${stats.gt_count || 0}</td>\n                <td class=\"text-center\">${stats.pred_count || 0}</td>\n                <td class=\"text-center\">${stats.tp || 0}</td>\n                <td class=\"text-center\">${stats.fp || 0}</td>\n                <td class=\"text-center\">${stats.fn || 0}</td>\n            </tr>\n        `).join('');\n\n        detailContent.innerHTML = `\n            <div class=\"image-header-section\">\n                <div class=\"d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-3\">\n                    <div>\n                        <h5 class=\"mb-1\"><i class=\"fas fa-image me-2\"></i>${this.escapeHtml(data.filename)}</h5>\n                        <p class=\"mb-0 text-muted\">\n                            <small>${data.dimensions ?         <button class=\"btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm\" id=\"prev-image-btn\">\n                            <i class=\"fas fa-chevron-left me-1\"></i> Previous\n                        </button>\n                        <button class=\"btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm\" id=\"next-image-btn\">\n                            Next <i class=\"fas fa-chevron-right ms-1\"></i>\n                        </button>\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n                <div class=\"d-flex gap-3\">\n                    <span class=\"badge bg-primary\">GT: ${totalGT}</span>\n                    <span class=\"badge bg-info\">Pred: ${totalPred}</span>\n                </div>\n\n                <!-- Box Visibility Toggles -->\n                <div class=\"d-flex gap-2 mb-3 mt-3\">\n                    <button class=\"btn btn-sm toggle-btn active\" id=\"toggle-gt-boxes\" title=\"Show/Hide Ground Truth Boxes\">\n                        <i class=\"fas fa-check-square me-1\"></i> GT Boxes\n                    </button>\n                    <button class=\"btn btn-sm toggle-btn active\" id=\"toggle-pred-boxes\" title=\"Show/Hide Prediction Boxes\">\n                        <i class=\"fas
